original: main.ts uses AppFactory.create with Fastify platform
refined: main.ts uses AppFactory.create with Fastify platform

original: API prefix is set to 'api'
refined: API prefix is set to 'api'

refined: Swagger enabled at /api/docs with title 'Koda API'

refined: app.module.ts imports ConfigModule (global), PrismaModule, AuthModule, AgentsModule, ProjectsModule, TicketsModule, CommentsModule

original: Server starts on port from API_PORT env (default 3100)
refined: Server starts on port from API_PORT env (default 3100)

original: bun run build passes
refined: bun run build passes

original: GET /api/docs returns 200
refined: GET /api/docs returns 200

refined: PrismaService extends PrismaClient

refined: PrismaService implements OnModuleInit with $connect

refined: PrismaService implements OnModuleDestroy with $disconnect

refined: PrismaModule decorated with @Global()

refined: PrismaModule exports PrismaService

original: Database migration 'init' created successfully
refined: Database migration 'init' created successfully

original: prisma.user.count() returns 0 without error
refined: prisma.user.count() returns 0 without error

original: POST /api/auth/register accepts { email, name, password }, creates User with bcrypt hash (12 rounds), returns { accessToken, refreshToken, user }
refined: POST /api/auth/register accepts { email, name, password }, creates User with bcrypt hash (12 rounds), returns { accessToken, refreshToken, user }

original: POST /api/auth/login accepts { email, password }, verifies credentials, returns token pair
refined: POST /api/auth/login accepts { email, password }, verifies credentials, returns token pair

original: POST /api/auth/refresh accepts Bearer refreshToken, returns new access and refresh tokens
refined: POST /api/auth/refresh accepts Bearer refreshToken, returns new access and refresh tokens

original: GET /api/auth/me accepts Bearer accessToken, returns authenticated User
refined: GET /api/auth/me accepts Bearer accessToken, returns authenticated User

original: JWT payload contains sub (userId), email, role
refined: JWT payload contains sub (userId), email, role

original: Invalid password returns 401
refined: Invalid password returns 401

original: Missing token on /api/auth/me returns 401
refined: Missing token on /api/auth/me returns 401

original: All endpoints properly documented in Swagger
refined: All endpoints properly documented in Swagger

original: ApiKeyGuard extracts Bearer token from Authorization header
refined: ApiKeyGuard extracts Bearer token from Authorization header

original: ApiKeyGuard computes HMAC-SHA256 with API_KEY_SECRET env
refined: ApiKeyGuard computes HMAC-SHA256 with API_KEY_SECRET env

original: ApiKeyGuard looks up Agent by apiKeyHash
refined: ApiKeyGuard looks up Agent by apiKeyHash

original: ApiKeyGuard attaches agent to request.agent and sets request.actorType = 'agent'
refined: ApiKeyGuard attaches agent to request.agent and sets request.actorType = 'agent'

original: Only ACTIVE agents accepted (reject PAUSED/OFFLINE)
refined: Only ACTIVE agents accepted (reject PAUSED/OFFLINE)

original: POST /api/agents generates random 32-byte hex key
refined: POST /api/agents generates random 32-byte hex key

original: POST /api/agents stores HMAC-SHA256 hash in database
refined: POST /api/agents stores HMAC-SHA256 hash in database

original: POST /api/agents returns raw key ONCE to client
refined: POST /api/agents returns raw key ONCE to client

original: CombinedAuthGuard attempts JWT first, falls back to ApiKeyGuard
refined: CombinedAuthGuard attempts JWT first, falls back to ApiKeyGuard

original: Invalid API key returns 401
refined: Invalid API key returns 401

original: Valid API key attaches agent to request
refined: Valid API key attaches agent to request

refined: @IsPublic() decorator uses SetMetadata('isPublic', true)

original: CombinedAuthGuard checks isPublic metadata before auth
refined: CombinedAuthGuard checks isPublic metadata before auth

refined: Public routes accessible without authentication

refined: CombinedAuthGuard registered globally via APP_GUARD

refined: @CurrentUser() returns req.user for JWT auth
